description_long: This house features a tall, pointed central tower with a red, steeply pitched roof, flanked by smaller turrets and angular rooflines. The exterior walls are a muted gray, punctuated by tall, narrow windows with dark trim, giving the structure a castle-like appearance. Decorative elements such as crenellations and a row of small triangular roof ornaments add to its historic, storybook charm. The building sits on a raised foundation, with an open archway at the base suggesting a covered entry or passage. The rooflines are complex, with multiple intersecting gables and a mix of roof heights. Overall, the house exudes a whimsical, medieval-inspired architectural style, reminiscent of European fantasy castles.
description: A whimsical, castle-like house with a tall central tower, red steeply pitched roofs, and narrow arched windows set in gray walls. Decorative crenellations and multiple turrets give it a storybook, medieval appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main tall tower, central entry archway, and decorative crenellations beneath the windows.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the secondary turret, angular rooflines, and a small balcony or overhang area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the elongated main structure, intersecting gables, and a row of triangular roof ornaments.
description_view_3: Side view dominated by the tall tower and a long wall with evenly spaced arched windows.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement of tall, narrow arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway is an open arch at the base of the central tower, with decorative crenellations and no visible porch or steps.
